$comment: Issue #1349 Mechanism B exemptions registry for gate-artifact-write-gate.sh fail-open paths. The hook itself fail-opens on manifest-missing and unknown-MODE per Constraint 19 (gate-readable manifest is auto-derived from state-registry; its absence is structural). This file documents intentional bypass categories so reviewers can distinguish 'expected fail-open' from 'unobserved silent bypass'. Empty by default — populate only when a category needs structured tracking. The companion friction-log entries in .runs/hook-friction.jsonl are the runtime telemetry; this file is the design-time documentation. Schema enforced by hook_bypass_manifest_completeness coherence rule.

schema.exemptions[].path: Repo-relative .runs/*.json path that the canonical writer policy exempts.
schema.exemptions[].justification: Why this path is allowed to be Write/Edit-direct. Required, non-empty.
schema.exemptions[].issue: GitHub issue link tracking the migration to canonical writer (or null if permanent).
